ddls:
CREATE TABLE "marine_bivalves" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bivalve specimen */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the species */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the bivalve in cm */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the bivalve in cm */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the bivalve in cm */,
  "whole_weight" REAL /* Whole weight of the bivalve in grams */,
  "shucked_weight" REAL /* Shucked weight of the bivalve in grams */,
  "viscera_weight" REAL /* Viscera weight of the bivalve in grams */,
  "shell_weight" REAL /* Shell weight of the bivalve in grams */,
  "sex_f" INTEGER /* Binary indicator: Female (1) or not (0) */,
  "sex_i" INTEGER /* Binary indicator: Intersex (1) or not (0) */,
  "sex_m" INTEGER /* Binary indicator: Male (1) or not (0) */,
  "rings" INTEGER /* Number of growth rings */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the water in which the bivalve was collected */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity of the water in which the bivalve was collected */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the water in which the bivalve was collected */,
  "oxygen_level" REAL /* Oxygen level in the water in which the bivalve was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the bivalve was collected */,
  "collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the bivalve was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the researcher who collected the bivalve */,
  "spawned" INTEGER /* Binary indicator: Spawns (1) or not (0) */,
  "spawn_date" TEXT /* Date when the bivalve spawned */,
  "spawn_count" INTEGER /* Number of offspring produced */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* General health status of the bivalve */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Specific disease if any */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the bivalve */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each bivalve specimen
Length of the bivalve in cm
Diameter of the bivalve in cm
